'''pazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:easely|easely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:easely|easely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| pazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:pazate|pazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pazatesher|pazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazatesherĂ«m|pazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pazatero|pazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pazateshĂ«|pazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazateshĂ«m|pazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipazatero|gokipazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipazateshĂ«|gokipazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazateshĂ«m|gokipazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopazankerom|gopazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopazankeshĂ«|gopazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazankeshĂ«m|gopazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopazankeya|gopazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pazaterom|pazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazatemu|pazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pazateya|pazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipazaterom|gokipazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazatemu|gokipazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipazateya|gokipazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:pazazate|pazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pazazatesher|pazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazazatesherĂ«m|pazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pazazatero|pazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pazazateshĂ«|pazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazazateshĂ«m|pazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipazazatero|gokipazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipazazateshĂ«|gokipazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazazateshĂ«m|gokipazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopazazankerom|gopazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopazazankeshĂ«|gopazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopazazankeshĂ«m|gopazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopazazankeya|gopazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pazazaterom|pazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pazazatemu|pazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pazazateya|pazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipazazaterom|gokipazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipazazatemu|gokipazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipazazateya|gokipazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:pĂŠzĂŠte|pĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pĂŠzĂŠtesher|pĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|pĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠzĂŠtero|pĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|pĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|pĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzĂŠtero|gokipĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokipĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokipĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gopĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gopĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gopĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gopĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pĂŠzĂŠterom|pĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pĂŠzĂŠtemu|pĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pĂŠzĂŠteya|pĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzĂŠterom|gokipĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokipĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipĂŠzĂŠteya|gokipĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafzafte|pafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:pafzaftesher|pafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafzaftesherĂ«m|pafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafzaftero|pafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafzafteshĂ«|pafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafzafteshĂ«m|pafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafzaftero|gokipafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafzafteshĂ«|gokipafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafzafteshĂ«m|gokipafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gopafzafnkerom|gopafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafzafnkeshĂ«|gopafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafzafnkeshĂ«m|gopafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gopafzafnkeya|gopafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:pafzafterom|pafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafzaftemu|pafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:pafzafteya|pafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokipafzafterom|gokipafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafzaftemu|gokipafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokipafzafteya|gokipafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
